curation_notes: Primary vulnerability in C3P0ConfigXmlUtils.java where extractXmlConfigFromInputStream creates a DocumentBuilderFactory without calling setExpandEntityReferences(false). DefaultC3P0ConfigFinder.java included as a secondary location because its findConfig method calls the vulnerable XML parsing functions without passing a flag to disable entity expansion. The upstream patch (swaldman/c3p0@7dfdda6) modifies both files plus documentation. The fork commit (zhutougg/c3p0@2eb0ea9) is a simpler one-line fix; the upstream commit is used as the authoritative patch. Vulnerability class xxe confirmed from CWE-611 and patch adding setExpandEntityReferences(false).
